tasks.title: Add loop guardrails
tasks.why: Yield and timeout guards stop hot loops from starving workers.
steps: Add sleep/yield in unbounded loops.
Add deadline or budget decrement checks.
Emit heartbeat metrics when loop runs long.

tasks.title: Harden lock renew atomicity
tasks.why: Owner-scoped atomic renew prevents split-brain execution.
steps: Replace expire-based renew with Lua owner-token check-and-renew.
Add owner token validation before extending TTL.
Add integration test that simulates concurrent renewal.

tasks.title: Stop swallowing exceptions
tasks.why: Escalated exceptions improve failure visibility and MTTR.
steps: Log caught exception with context.
Rethrow or convert to domain error with cause.
Add tests for failure-path observability.

tasks.title: Set explicit external timeouts
tasks.why: Timeouts bound downstream latency and protect worker pools.
steps: Set request timeout and connect_timeout on HTTP calls.
Set CURLOPT_TIMEOUT and CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT for curl flows.
Centralize defaults in one client factory.

tasks.title: Bound in-memory buffers
tasks.why: Bounded queues avoid unbounded memory growth in daemons.
steps: Add max size checks before appending in loops.
Compact old entries or stream to external storage.
Track memory watermark in runtime metrics.

tasks.title: Add structured log context
tasks.why: Correlation IDs make incidents traceable across systems.
steps: Add context array to logger calls.
Include corr_id/request_id/job_id consistently.
Update logging helper to enforce context shape.

findings.title: Unbounded Map Growth
findings.message: Detects map/array append patterns without clear bound management.
findings.impact: Unbounded map growth can produce long-tail memory leaks in workers.
findings.recommendation: Bound map size and evict stale entries.

findings.title: Shared Mutable Static State
findings.message: Detects mutable static state declarations likely shared across workers.
findings.impact: Shared mutable static state introduces cross-request coupling and race risk.
findings.recommendation: Prefer immutable constants or scoped instance state over mutable static state.

findings.impact: Retries without backoff amplify outages and increase upstream pressure.
findings.recommendation: Add bounded exponential backoff with jitter for retries.

findings.title: Retry Without Max Attempts
findings.message: Detects retry flows without explicit attempt caps.
findings.impact: Unbounded retries can create infinite work loops and resource exhaustion.
findings.recommendation: Enforce max attempt limits and dead-letter handling.

findings.title: External Call Without Timeout

tasks.title: Add loop guardrails
tasks.why: Yield and timeout guards stop hot loops from starving workers.
steps: Add sleep/yield in unbounded loops.
Add deadline or budget decrement checks.
Emit heartbeat metrics when loop runs long.

tasks.title: Harden lock renew atomicity
tasks.why: Owner-scoped atomic renew prevents split-brain execution.
steps: Replace expire-based renew with Lua owner-token check-and-renew.
Add owner token validation before extending TTL.
Add integration test that simulates concurrent renewal.

tasks.title: Stop swallowing exceptions
tasks.why: Escalated exceptions improve failure visibility and MTTR.
steps: Log caught exception with context.
Rethrow or convert to domain error with cause.
Add tests for failure-path observability.

tasks.title: Set explicit external timeouts
tasks.why: Timeouts bound downstream latency and protect worker pools.
steps: Set request timeout and connect_timeout on HTTP calls.
Set CURLOPT_TIMEOUT and CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT for curl flows.
Centralize defaults in one client factory.

tasks.title: Bound in-memory buffers
tasks.why: Bounded queues avoid unbounded memory growth in daemons.
steps: Add max size checks before appending in loops.
Compact old entries or stream to external storage.
Track memory watermark in runtime metrics.

tasks.title: Add structured log context
tasks.why: Correlation IDs make incidents traceable across systems.
steps: Add context array to logger calls.
Include corr_id/request_id/job_id consistently.
Update logging helper to enforce context shape.

tasks.title: Add loop guardrails
tasks.why: Yield and timeout guards stop hot loops from starving workers.

Emit heartbeat metrics when loop runs long.

tasks.why: Owner-scoped atomic renew prevents split-brain execution.
steps: Replace expire-based renew with Lua owner-token check-and-renew.
Add owner token validation before extending TTL.
Add integration test that simulates concurrent renewal.

tasks.title: Stop swallowing exceptions
tasks.why: Escalated exceptions improve failure visibility and MTTR.

Rethrow or convert to domain error with cause.
Add tests for failure-path observability.

tasks.title: Set explicit external timeouts
tasks.why: Timeouts bound downstream latency and protect worker pools.
steps: Set request timeout and connect_timeout on HTTP calls.

Centralize defaults in one client factory.

tasks.title: Bound in-memory buffers

steps: Add max size checks before appending in loops.
Compact old entries or stream to external storage.
Track memory watermark in runtime metrics.

tasks.title: Add structured log context
tasks.why: Correlation IDs make incidents traceable across systems.
steps: Add context array to logger calls.
Include corr_id/request_id/job_id consistently.
Update logging helper to enforce context shape.

tasks.title: Add loop guardrails
tasks.why: Yield and timeout guards stop hot loops from starving workers.
steps: Add sleep/yield in unbounded loops.
Add deadline or budget decrement checks.
Emit heartbeat metrics when loop runs long.

tasks.title: Harden lock renew atomicity
tasks.why: Owner-scoped atomic renew prevents split-brain execution.
steps: Replace expire-based renew with Lua owner-token check-and-renew.
Add owner token validation before extending TTL.
Add integration test that simulates concurrent renewal.

tasks.title: Stop swallowing exceptions
tasks.why: Escalated exceptions improve failure visibility and MTTR.
steps: Log caught exception with context.
Rethrow or convert to domain error with cause.
Add tests for failure-path observability.

tasks.title: Set explicit external timeouts
tasks.why: Timeouts bound downstream latency and protect worker pools.
steps: Set request timeout and connect_timeout on HTTP calls.
Set CURLOPT_TIMEOUT and CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT for curl flows.
Centralize defaults in one client factory.

tasks.title: Bound in-memory buffers
tasks.why: Bounded queues avoid unbounded memory growth in daemons.
steps: Add max size checks before appending in loops.
Compact old entries or stream to external storage.
Track memory watermark in runtime metrics.

tasks.title: Add structured log context
tasks.why: Correlation IDs make incidents traceable across systems.
steps: Add context array to logger calls.
Include corr_id/request_id/job_id consistently.
Update logging helper to enforce context shape.

tasks.title: Add loop guardrails
tasks.why: Yield and timeout guards stop hot loops from starving workers.
steps: Add sleep/yield in unbounded loops.
Add deadline or budget decrement checks.
Emit heartbeat metrics when loop runs long.

tasks.title: Harden lock renew atomicity
tasks.why: Owner-scoped atomic renew prevents split-brain execution.
steps: Replace expire-based renew with Lua owner-token check-and-renew.
Add owner token validation before extending TTL.
Add integration test that simulates concurrent renewal.

tasks.title: Stop swallowing exceptions
tasks.why: Escalated exceptions improve failure visibility and MTTR.
steps: Log caught exception with context.
Rethrow or convert to domain error with cause.
Add tests for failure-path observability.

tasks.title: Set explicit external timeouts
tasks.why: Timeouts bound downstream latency and protect worker pools.
steps: Set request timeout and connect_timeout on HTTP calls.
Set CURLOPT_TIMEOUT and CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT for curl flows.
Centralize defaults in one client factory.

tasks.title: Bound in-memory buffers
tasks.why: Bounded queues avoid unbounded memory growth in daemons.
steps: Add max size checks before appending in loops.
Compact old entries or stream to external storage.
Track memory watermark in runtime metrics.

tasks.title: Add structured log context
tasks.why: Correlation IDs make incidents traceable across systems.
steps: Add context array to logger calls.
Include corr_id/request_id/job_id consistently.
Update logging helper to enforce context shape.
